missing — fresh install with no settings.json on disk.

Setup wiring (see fixtures_test.go):
  1. No settings.json is created in ~/.claude/ at all.
  2. Discovery admits this case via the error-only.txt marker so
     the "settings.json missing" absence itself is what the test
     exercises.

Expected Import result:
  errors.Is(err, claudecode.ErrNoConfig) == true
